create: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_roles (user_id INT NOT NULL, role_id INT NOT NULL, assigned_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, PRIMARY KEY (user_id, role_id), FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, FOREIGN KEY (role_id) REFERENCES roles(id) ON DELETE CASCADE);

delete.by_user_and_role: DELETE FROM user_roles WHERE user_id = %s AND role_id = %s;

fetch.by_user: SELECT r.id AS role_id, r.name, r.description FROM user_roles ur JOIN roles r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE ur.user_id = %s;
fetch.role_names_by_user: SELECT r.name FROM user_roles ur JOIN roles r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE ur.user_id = %s;
fetch.has_role: SELECT 1 FROM user_roles WHERE user_id = %s AND role_id = %s LIMIT 1;
